response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source leadership, and exposure to agentic workflows at re:cinq, but lacks demonstrable production-scale multi-agent AI systems in fintech, regulatory compliance experience, or leadership scaling teams beyond 10–15 people — critical gaps for a CTO role in regulated AI-driven fintech infrastructure.
strengths: Hands-on experience with agentic workflows and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Proven ability to build and lead open-source distributed systems (GISCollective)
Strong backend and event-driven architecture skills across DLang, Node.js, and microservices
concerns: No evidence of building or operating multi-agent AI systems in fintech or regulated environments
Lacks documented experience scaling engineering teams to 30+ or developing senior technical leadership layers
Minimal indication of financial infrastructure knowledge (credit risk, working capital, compliance)
